title: Project configuration schema
description: Schema for project-config.json — project-specific values (domains, owners) plus the scale profile and flags that select which artifact types are enabled. Copy project-config.example.json to project-config.json and fill in your values, then run scripts/generate-fileclasses.py.

profile.description: Scale profile preset, resolved via kit-manifest.json's 'profiles' section. S = small projects (VISION, US, TASK, TEST, ADR). M = standard projects (core tier, 10 types). L = large/complex systems (core + discovery + architecture + delivery tiers). Omit this field entirely to disable filtering — every artifact type is enabled, matching pre-2.2.0 behavior.

flags.description: Orthogonal type groups to enable in addition to the profile, resolved via kit-manifest.json's 'flags' section. 'compliance' adds BRQ/BR/CTRL; 'sources' adds SRC. profile: S combined with flags: [compliance] is invalid — BRQ/BR/CTRL derive into FR/NFR, which profile S does not include. Use profile M or L for regulated projects.

domains.description: Project's domain codes (used for ID generation and Metadata Menu dropdowns). Keep in sync with 00-meta/taxonomy/domains.md.

owners.description: Valid owner identifiers (used for Metadata Menu dropdowns).
